acceptance_criteria: Ancestors array is ordered from thread root to immediate parent of the requested post; descendants are ordered top-down; 3-level nested thread returns correct structure; mix of local and remote posts in thread works; circular references don't infinite-loop
description: Implement thread context: ancestors (posts from root to immediate parent) and descendants (all replies in the thread). Ancestors must be sorted oldest-first (root first). Descendants must be sorted oldest-first (depth-first tree flatten). This endpoint is historically buggy across implementations — test it with 3+ level nested threads.
design: Ancestors: walk in_reply_to_id chain upward until null. Reverse for oldest-first ordering. Descendants: BFS or DFS from the post ID downward, following reverse-lookup of in_reply_to_id. Must handle mix of posts and remote_posts tables. Limit depth to prevent pathological threads.
title: GET /api/v1/statuses/:id/context — thread reconstruction
